series_metadata.series_title: Documentation provided to the Attorney General
series_metadata.series_description: Documentation, including, but not limited to, participant student account documents (participant''s application, master promissory note, statement of participant account, or other similar statements demonstrating proof of the participant''s participation in the program) provided to the Attorney General, upon request, for participants in default.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: conclusion of fiscal year, and an additional 4 fiscal years
